original_statement: who is the only player to win mvp in consecutive years?
mutated_statement: who is the only person to have a top recognition in consecutive years?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Award-specific→generic + Verb aspect change: "player" → "person" | "win MVP" → "have a top recognition" (removes sports/award specificity and shifts from active "win" to stative "have").

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought中的句子“Explanation: The 'top recognition' in this context refers to the MVP award...”和裁判评语“因此，预测答案是正确的”可识别出关键信息。Agent 将“top recognition”直接解释为MVP，并在没有提及歧义或请求澄清的情况下给出具体人名（Mauro Biello）和年份证据，且judge字段标注为[Correct]。该行为显示Agent 未在任何地方指出问题不明确、未表现出不确定性或要求补充信息，而是按自己的假设直接回答，因此归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
